plugins.name: statsotter
plugins.description: Talk to StatsOtter in plain language: create, edit, publish and delete cards, download and edit the markdown knowledge document behind a card, research thin docs into deep ones, edit the site's left sidebar, or run a published workflow on your local data — no slash commands, no web UI needed.

metadata.description: StatsOtter for Claude Code — manage cards and the site's left sidebar, edit the knowledge documents that train the platform's AI, and run published workflows on local data, all in plain language.
